```json
{
  "checks": {
    "check_balance_sheet": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Balance check: ✓ all periods - Assets = Liabilities + Equity"},
    "check_cash_flow_reconciles": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Cash flow statement not prepared - only approximate cash usage derived from balance sheet changes"},
    "check_pnl_flows_to_bs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "RE change Y0→Y1 = -590K vs Net income -224K, with $366K SBC properly documented"},
    "check_opening_balances": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Balance sheet shows proper carry-forward from Y0 through Y3"},
    "check_no_hardcoded": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Revenue derives from ARR growth assumptions, expenses tied to headcount plan"},
    "check_growth_from_assumptions": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Growth rates clearly stated: 40% Y1, 35% Y2, 30% Y3 with decelerating curve rationale"},
    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "ACV $18K × customer count aligns with revenue, gross margin 80% consistently applied"},
    "check_no_circular_refs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No circular references noted or apparent in the model structure"},
    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Cash flow statement missing - only P&L and balance sheet present"},
    "check_assumptions_page": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Comprehensive assumptions section with growth rates, NRR, churn, ACV, and headcount plan"},
    "check_time_granularity": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Consistent annual periods (Y1, Y2, Y3) throughout all statements"},
    "check_full_horizon": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Full 3-year horizon covered across all statements and projections"},
    "check_no_negative_revenue": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "All revenue figures positive: $5.3M, $7.0M, $8.9M across years"},
    "check_cash_not_negative": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash remains positive: $5.8M → $5.3M → $5.0M → $5.1M with 36+ months runway"},
    "check_margins_plausible": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Gross margin 80% reasonable for SaaS, operating margins -5% to +0.5% typical for growth stage"},
    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Headcount plan detailed with avg cost $155K, engineering $175K, sales $150K, others $130K"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "No tax provision applied despite positive Y3 pre-tax income of $74K"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear period labels Y0, Y1, Y2, Y3 throughout all statements"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Units clearly specified as ($000s) in financial statements"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear distinction between assumption inputs and calculated outputs in model structure"}
  },
  "rubric": {
    "rubric_assumption_quality": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Well-sourced assumptions with benchmarks (Twilio, Datadog), industry standards for sales productivity, reasonable ranges"},
    "rubric_scenario_robustness": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Multiple sensitivity analyses for growth, NRR, and churn with bear/base/bull cases and break-even timing"},
    "rubric_operational_realism": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Detailed headcount ramp by department, usage vs subscription revenue split, realistic hiring costs by function"},
    "rubric_cash_flow_awareness": {"score": 2, "verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Missing cash flow statement, only approximate burn rates, though runway awareness exists"},
    "rubric_decision_utility": {"score": 3, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Good sensitivity analysis enables decision-making, but missing cash flow limits funding decision utility"}
  }
}
```
